changeSet.author: openelis-virology

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Virology and Vaccine Unit' AND is_template = true

changeSet.comment: Add Virus Culture page (Page 5) to existing Virology notebook instances that don't have it
changeSet.sql: -- Insert Virus Culture page for each Virology notebook that doesn't have page 5 INSERT INTO clinlims.notebook_page ( id, title, instructions, content, page_order, completed, page_type, notebook_id, last_updated ) SELECT nextval('clinlims.notebook_page_seq'), 'Virus Culture', 'Inoculate cells with virus. Record virus strain, culture conditions (temperature, CO₂ percentage, duration), and any observations during the culture period.', 'Virus Culture - Virus inoculation and culture condition tracking', 5, false, 'BULK_DATA_ENTRY', n.id, ${now} FROM clinlims.notebook n WHERE n.title LIKE '%Virology%' AND n.is_template = false AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM clinlims.notebook_page np WHERE np.notebook_id = n.id AND np.page_order = 5 );

rollback.sql: -- Remove Virus Culture pages added by this changeset DELETE FROM clinlims.notebook_page WHERE page_order = 5 AND title = 'Virus Culture' AND notebook_id IN ( SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title LIKE '%Virology%' AND is_template = false );
